summary: Workspace PR queue fully cleared: PRs #131 and #133 closed by human (overlap resolved), #143/#148/#149 all merged. Sprint goal (AG Studio Portfolio Framework) is complete and live on master. Cross-repo PR #472 (outcome filter on events page) is all-green and ready for human review/merge. Main risks: swarm API quota cascade still active (29 agents rate-limited in 02:00–04:00 UTC window per #137), agent-guard CI failures blocking 7 kernel/cloud PRs (#agent-guard-ci-failures P1), QA agents on bench-devs-platform unconfirmed (needs retrigger for #146). Swarm health script confirmed telemetry pipeline healthy (last event 0.1h ago).
